74389.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Canton's $355 million raise
74389.body:
Citigroup to offer tokenized shares of private companies for wealthy and institutional clients | South Korean police book Bithumb CEO as bribery suspect in lawmaker hiring probe | BlackRock files new amendment for yield-generating bitcoin ETF; launch expected soon | Bernstein calls FIFA World Cup a 'watershed moment' for prediction markets, projects $5-10B consumer volume surge |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Thursday! *Bitfinex* analysts said ( https://blog.bitfinex.com/bitfinex-alpha/the-btc-air-gap-closes/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) *bitcoin's* recent sell-off has largely flushed excess leverage from the market, shifting focus to ETF demand and next week's *FOMC* meeting as the key drivers of the next move.

In today's newsletter, *Canton* developer *Digital Asset* raises $355 million, *Citigroup* plans to offer tokenized shares of private companies, *South Korean* police book *Bithumb's* CEO as a suspect in a bribery investigation, and more.

Meanwhile, on the ground at *BTC Prague* , *Strike* and *Twenty One* CEO *Jack Mallers* said ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404453/sell-what-you-can-not-what-you-want-jack-mallers-bitcoin-pricing-global-liquidity-crisis?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) *bitcoin* is pricing in a global liquidity crisis: "you sell what you can, not what you want."

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*💰 a16z crypto leads $355 million raise for Canton developer Digital Asset*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/404386/a16z-crypto-leads-355-million-raise-for-canton-developer-digital-asset?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Digital Asset* , the company developing the *Canton Network* , raised $355 million in a funding round led by *a16z crypto* , with participation from major TradFi and crypto firms.

* CEO *Yuval Rooz* said the fresh capital will help Digital Asset accelerate strategic partnerships, pursue acquisitions, and support ecosystem growth.
* Many of the new investors received equity rather than token allocations and are expected to become users of the Canton Network.
* Canton claims it has supported the issuance of $6 trillion in tokenized assets and counts f

74388.subject: 🗞️ Cycle Low, Strategy's Reversal and Institutions Buying the Dip at $65K
74388.body:
Bitcoin fell to $59,100. Here is what the data says about who
stepped in.    


Kraken ( " target= )  -->  Kraken ( " target= )




**********************************
Compass
**********************************

Delivering Insights & News

See latest prices (
https://link.kraken.com/f/a/4RXP7InNjjHLsvW6rGg9Zg~~/AAQRxRA~/p_DNBZmRwT6t2qpltwqBwL8GuOXMhaIkl4ROZiUpgMrcxS1koU3nOl-5d8FAUWGpNEN95Rbx_H24QKmD65ntm5trpkjH3xGCyg0XqMWIqKvqQMqdlfhxkVWp57Wn3MR-MhUfYUfzswsABn93KJ8Jlg~~
)     Kraken              

*****************************************************************
BTC Below $60K, a Blowout Jobs Report and Strategy’s Rapid
Reversal
*****************************************************************

June 5 – 11, 2026

Bitcoin touched a cycle low of $59,100 on Friday after May
nonfarm payrolls came in at 172,000, more than double the 85,000
consensus forecast, sending the Nasdaq down 4.2 percent in its
worst session since April 2025 and reviving fears of a Federal
Reserve rate hike. The asset has partially recovered to
approximately $63,400 at the time of writing, a weekly range of
roughly $5,100 and a decline of around 10 percent from last
Thursday’s open. The Fear and Greed Index hit eight on Saturday,
its lowest reading since 2022.

Against that backdrop, Strategy reversed course within one
week, purchasing 1,550 BTC for $101 million just days after its
first disclosed sale in years, while Bernstein analysts argued in
a Monday note that the current holder base is structurally more
stable than any prior retail-driven cycle. Wednesday’s May CPI
print, forecast at 4.2 percent, and the June 16 to 17 FOMC
meeting will now determine whether the macro pressure holding
Bitcoin below $65,000 eases or intensifies.





---------------
Market Overview
---------------

A Jobs Report That Shocked Markets Sent Bitcoin to Its Lowest
Level Since October 2024 (

)  Source: Coindesk 
( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/SqrnzXuYsYlspwFmZfm4WQ~~/AAQRxRA~/yVs1_OhwVb9oojTD_Wrmi9A_5wR-m2AElclE9u-qajN4vEi2KHxn1F6FZbqCACZqclBTv8eWR2LZck1DHTDUSFNM0uL2QC8JYP8pDOwSpRcq8ClhHo1PIy5Z4VP99v4Xek_XS6r9WJ3M0rBOwMHNkc_Yoxd4vK5XW4baLad9_pU~ ). Data

🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: The European Central Bank raised interest rates for the first time in three years as BlackRock updated its SEC filing to race Goldman Sachs to market with a Bitcoin Premium Income ETF; simultaneously, ecosystem expansion surged via a $355M funding round for Digital Asset alongside major USDC payout and crypto reward partnerships across MassPay, Uniswap, and OKX. 🤖 European Central Bank raises interest rates for first time in three years The ECB's rate hike signals a shift in monetary policy, potentially impacting risk assets and crypto markets amid ongoing inflation concerns. The post European Central Bank raises interest rates for first time in three years appeared first on Crypto Briefing. Explore more 📈 OKX launches football prediction program with Bitcoin rewards tied to 2026 World Cup OKX's initiative could significantly boost crypto adoption by integrating digital assets with global sports events, enhancing fan engagement. The post OKX launches football prediction program with Bitcoin rewards tied to 2026 World Cup appeared first on Crypto Briefing. More details 🤖 Sen. Rounds emphasizes urgency of AI adoption ahead of Senate hearing The urgency in AI adoption highlights a strategic pivot in US policy, potentially reshaping global power dynamics and economic landscapes. The post Sen. Read more 👛 Uniswap partners with Binance Wallet for $300K USDC rewards program This partnership could significantly enhance DeFi accessibility, potentially increasing user engagement and liquidity in Ethereum-based protocols. The post Uniswap partners with Binance Wallet for $300K USDC rewards program appeared first on Crypto Briefing. More info 📰 MassPay integrates Coinbase payments for instant USDC cross-border payouts MassPay's integration of Coinbase for USDC payouts enhances cross-border transaction efficiency, potentially boosting stablecoin adoption in enterprises. The post MassPay integrates Coinbase payments for instant USDC cross-border payouts appeared first on Crypto Briefing. Learn more 📜 Digital Asset secures $355M funding round led by Andreessen Horowitz The funding highlights the growing convergence of traditional finance and blockchain, potentially reshaping capital markets infrastructure. 74383.subject: Ukrainian strikes are inflicting pain deep inside Russia
74383.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDR9AAcAAAAAApIvEMBklZ3fryhtY6_LelJoMNJ-_RGuYUFqDuVQeIbvQihLo2aIomIbqQ4J1jbUdOuJjZ9GJrU1SPAMgEW152TjRxNjcYKt8zQF6NjEw6WfJA 

June 11th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDR9AAcAAAAAApIvEMBlpC1kEJbwvGSj0c76h_xOCxuXTyRQB3GwGqINI2ybTxOlaTExx-T8Bn8EM-KsXJVG_98AKWwkUAUQUwrhqovf-H7d6_6zUc92wLfgWQ 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDR9AAcAAAAAApIvEMBmpxKBfsHJ9gIcp2dOAZYSmUINkUfAX8Vu3PDkYELPAq2TVc684zEiWJfuepwkIrZe1swWO5GHQL2wqWNGwZFj2grLJFvMT6SeaNtGdQ 



 
 

Bo Franklin

Senior digital editor



Smoke billowing over St Petersburg, as it did last week after a Ukrainian drone strike, brings Vladimir Putin’s war close to home for Russians. But such images fail to capture the scale of these attacks. Our interactive team has modelled 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDR9AAcAAAAAApIvEMBnSBzz6X7WRYKE9PJf3EvWNwnbc527eA5XqA3f_5fhJk2W-VqD9PY8A-rqkhBILLB0525wkGCYV2_R3eYljWcFbMk3knk-Jl4i 
thousands of strikes inside Russia  to gauge their power.


If Elon Musk’s big IPO goes to plan, he may soon be the world’s first dollar trillionaire. Why would anyone want that? Better to be a 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDR9AAcAAAAAApIvEMBow8z1Z9Ca5nYn_wNIccrpc1GKfI3s9yZ4gilBKScpt-eezHAh

74375.subject: 🇺🇦 Ваш грошовий переказ не було доставлено
74375.body:
PS Ваш переказ не був
доставлений і Paysend здійснив повернення коштів        Вітаємо,
Oleh,

Повідомляємо, що ваш нещодавній переказ не був доставлений.
Платіж було повернено на ваш початковий спосіб оплати. Обробка
повернення коштів банком може зайняти до трьох днів. Деталі
транзакції:

* Номер транзакції: 21429828200

* Сума: 100
EUR

Можливі причини проблем з переказом:

* Неправильні дані одержувача: Переконайтеся, що дані одержувача
правильні
* Потрібна додаткова інформація: Нам може знадобитися більше
інформації від вас для обробки переказу
* Перевищено ліміти: Перевірте, що ви не перевищили ліміти
переказу, встановлені Paysend або банком одержувача
* Тимчасові проблеми: Можливі тимчасові проблеми з банком або
мережею одержувача
* Відмова банком одержувача: Банк одержувача міг відхилити кошти
з власних причин
Рекомендовані дії:

* Перевірте дані вашого одержувача
* Зверніть увагу на повідомлення від Paysend з проханням надати
додаткову інформацію
* Переконайтеся, що ви не перевищили ліміти переказу Paysend
* Перевірте, що у вас стабільне інтернет-з’єднання
* Ознайомтесь з будь-якими повідомленнями про помилки в
інтерфейсі Paysend і дійте згідно з наданими інструкціями
Будь ласка, виконайте наведені вище рекомендовані дії і
повторіть ваш переказ.

ПОВТОРІТЬ ПЕРЕКАЗ 
( http://clicks.paysend.com/f/a/arciXymAZ8HnznQZQyaS8Q~~/AAAHahA~/60sOGfde0f2QVUxmYJqVKrmGaqwWa32zaYA1AEJLFxcc4gtD14P-voDFIavbblajpqCzGPbQvNu-jJkMKNelz4xXifXXbynqyglIIXcC-nTOy_cNG6iMY1XnvLMQkchvP6lcab800hU6Z-RnSfVl1g~~ )       Якщо проблема
залишається, будь ласка, зв'яжіться з нашою службою підтримки,
використовуючи ваш номер транзакції
21429828200 для отримання допомоги через
чат або форму зворотного зв'язку 
( http://clicks.paysend.com/f/a/WJpAV1wLdHyNLoIsrc9y4g~~/AAAHahA~/DF2uwq4a63CLTT6kMIf_splIB9aviTwhylcpuYncMuol-JglcGD6ChmF_Hbt7TxuiQ9f4vWJFI8sG1Xdt0SmMDWezM8QPXBcFsMEqqBbh63GG1vF_ikCKEMbMgGjpat_t5v9J8Z3GuJp_k5PXv2bPw~~ ).

* *                       Чудово          Stars
